item.title: New Glarus: Wisconsin Belgian Red, Ep. 182
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we go deep into the cellar with a 3-year-old bottle of New Glarus Wisconsin Belgian Red Cherry! This Belgian style fruit Ale is a limited release that uses over a pound of Wisconsin Cherries in each bottle! It’s been known to cause a rush when it’s released and has […]

The post New Glarus: Wisconsin Belgian Red, Ep. 182 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Oskar Blues and Sun King: Chaka, Ep. 170
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America TV loves collaboration beers, but this week is extra special featuring a CANlaboration! Leave it to the craft-beer-in-a-can innovators Oskar Blues Brewery, to team up with Sun King Brewing Company, to produce the first American Craft beer in a re-sealable can!! Chaka is a Belgian Style Ale brewed with Shagbark Hickory Syrup and […]

The post Oskar Blues and Sun King: Chaka, Ep. 170 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Lagunitas: Little Sumpin’ Wild Ale, Ep. 133
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Most people like a Little Sumpin’, so this week on Beer America TV, we’re giving you a Little Sumpin’ Wild! Described as the big sister of A Little Sumpin’ Sumpin’ Ale, this Belgian Style Strong Pale Ale from the Lagunitas Brewing Company is truly a step up in taste and style . It has a […]

The post Lagunitas: Little Sumpin’ Wild Ale, Ep. 133 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: The Bruery: Orchard White – Ep. 64
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week’s episode brings you one of the most unique beers we’ve tasted in a long time. Orchard White from The Bruery is an incredibly aromatic Belgian Style witbier that’s brewed with coriander, citrus peel and lavender that take hold of the senses and never let go . A truly remarkable drinking experience that must […]

The post The Bruery: Orchard White – Ep. 64 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Brooklyn Brewery: Brooklyn Local 2, Ep. 54
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
The Brooklyn Local 1 was a pick for the best beer in 2008 by a couple of us here at Beer America TV, so what does Brooklyn Brewery come back with for the second edition of this beer? A Belgian-inspired Strong Dark Ale! New York State raw wildflower honey, Belgian dark candi sugar and sweet […]

The post Brooklyn Brewery: Brooklyn Local 2, Ep. 54 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Episode 38 – Monkshine Belgian Pale Ale
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
4 + Brewing Company has brewed up a Belgian Pale Ale that is remarkably light and low in alcohol, after all it’s brewed in Utah and it’s the law! What does the 4 + stand for? Watch and find out.

The post Episode 38 – Monkshine Belgian Pale Ale first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
